source: retinanet_dc_ops.pt (HF datasets/abhijitbetigeri/dc-ops-dataset), torchvision RetinaNet ResNet50-FPN, QNN backbone+heads export w8a16, ImageNet norm baked into the .pte wrapper; C++ anchor decode + per-class NMS in qnn_socket_server. Head is 1-indexed (class 0 = background); decode skips background and emits the 16 0-indexed DC classes (same taxonomy as YOLO). Boxes rendered as 4-point polygons.
